name: The Peanutshell Bella Pink Patchwork Quilt Baby Crib Bedding Set - 3pc
description: The romantic Bella bedding set by The Peanutshell will create an enchanting nursery for your little girl. Opulent pink crinkled taffeta and cream tufted taffeta are arranged with accents of gray in an elegant patchwork design. The lovely floral print and bow details make this collection too charming to not fall in love with.
